# 📚 Documentation Guide

Quick reference for navigating the AI Research Panel System documentation.

## 🚀 I'm New Here

Start with **[GETTING-STARTED.md](../GETTING-STARTED.md)**

This guide walks you through:
- ✅ Installing prerequisites (Docker + NVIDIA API key)
- ✅ Configuring the environment
- ✅ Starting the application
- ✅ Uploading your first document
- ✅ Getting results

**Time to complete:** 10 minutes

---

## 🔍 Quick Search

**Looking for...**

- **Installation** → [GETTING-STARTED.md](../GETTING-STARTED.md) Step 3
- **API endpoints** → [API-GUIDE.md](../API-GUIDE.md) or [README.md](../README.md#api-documentation)
- **Docker commands** → [DOCKER-GUIDE.md](../DOCKER-GUIDE.md#management-commands)
- **Environment variables** → [README.md](../README.md#configuration)
- **Troubleshooting** → [GETTING-STARTED.md](../GETTING-STARTED.md#common-issues)
- **Testing** → [API-GUIDE.md](../API-GUIDE.md)
- **Contributing** → [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- **Security** → [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md)

## 🆘 Need Help?

1. **Check the docs** - Most questions are answered here
2. **Search issues** - [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/navinavi029/AI-Research-Panel-System-AIRPS/issues)
3. **Ask the community** - [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/navinavi029/AI-Research-Panel-System-AIRPS/discussions)
4. **Report bugs** - [New Issue](https://github.com/navinavi029/AI-Research-Panel-System-AIRPS/issues/new)

---

## 📝 Documentation Standards

All documentation follows these principles:

- ✅ **Clear** - Easy to understand
- ✅ **Concise** - No unnecessary information
- ✅ **Complete** - All necessary details included
- ✅ **Current** - Up to date with latest version
- ✅ **Consistent** - Similar structure across docs

---

## 🔄 Keep Documentation Updated

When making changes:

1. Update the relevant document
2. Check cross-references
3. Update this guide if structure changes
4. Test all commands and examples

---

**Last Updated:** April 2026
